title: See how Gemma  can explore, plan, and scale!
summary: Google presents Gemma alongside ADK, BigQuery MCP, and Cloud Run to demonstrate optimization of business operations through large-scale data exploration. The demonstration showcases the capability to explore, plan, and scale across a vast dataset.
